== Tasks

[[optimize]]
=== optimize

[role="small", width="50%", float="right", cols="1"]
|===
a|.Context
[disc]
  * Free running
* Reads port `<<result>>`
* Reads port `<<allow>>`
* Updates port `<<params>>`
* Updates port `<<best_params>>`
* Updates port `<<best_value>>`
* Updates port `<<status>>`
a|.Throws
[disc]
 * `exception ::bayes_opt::e_sys`
 ** `short` `code`
 ** `string<128>` `what`

|===

Bayesian optimization loop

'''
